items.headline: Fable 5 ships; note the silent fallback
items.body: Anthropic released Claude Fable 5 (`claude-fable-5`) yesterday, their strongest generally-available model at $10/$50 per million tokens in/out. straightforward drop-in for LaborQuest and ADO MCP — just update the model ID. the design detail worth flagging: on cybersecurity and bio/chem queries, the model silently falls back to Opus 4.8 rather than refusing — no error thrown, response just gets quieter. not a concern for either project's domain, but worth knowing before assuming stable model behavior across all input types.
